# llms.txt for https://www.quickmedcert.com
# This file provides guidance to LLM crawlers on allowed content

# -------------------------------------
# ✅ Website Information
Website: https://www.quickmedcert.com
Name: QuickMedCert
Description: Medical Certificate Automation Platform | Streamline healthcare documentation with our AI-powered medical certificate generation system. Transform medical workflows with automated, accurate, and efficient certificate processing for healthcare providers.

# -------------------------------------
# ✅ Core Content Sections
Allow: /
Allow: /#pricing
Allow: /#features
Allow: /#how-it-works
Allow: /blog/*

# -------------------------------------
# ✅ Important Legal Pages
Allow: /terms
Allow: /privacy

# -------------------------------------
# ❌ Disallowed API or Internal Paths (implicitly via robots.txt)
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /admin/

# -------------------------------------
# 📌 Sitemap for better discovery
Sitemap: https://www.quickmedcert.com/sitemap.xml

# -------------------------------------
# 📝 Notes for LLM Crawlers
